description: Access Oracle Autonomous Database via the ORDS REST API — execute SQL and explore schema

tools.description: Execute SQL statements against Oracle Autonomous Database via the ORDS REST API and return results

schema.name: sql
schema.description: The SQL statement to execute (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DDL)

schema.name: limit
schema.description: Maximum number of rows to return (default 100)

tools.description: List tables, views, and describe table structures in the Oracle database

schema.name: operation
schema.description: Operation to perform: list_tables, list_views, describe_table

tools.description: List all database schemas (users) in the Oracle database
